review_title: Working with the LH.io tool and team has been great.
description: The biggest benefit is that the software gives PEFS an extra level of transparency to provide with our service line. Not many of our competitors can show real-team reports on tasks and progress of day to day services.
author: Kevin J.
pros: The software allows us to provide an extra layer of transparency to our service offering to our customers. The new GPF function takes the tool to the next level!
cons: The con is training out teams to take full advantage of all the software has to offer. However, it's a game changer for our teams when used correctly.

description: Very happy. Their support teams are top notch and we get the support we need right away. They actively ask and engage for what we want to see in the suite. Their implementation team did an excellent job helping us get it up and running. They have been great to work with and we are looking to deploy it further into the businesses sites to meet the needs of our clients.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is an excellent suite of software that does 'just work', once you have it setup. We have our staff using it and it reducing the touch points they would have had to make manually, saving them time and providing a real time update to our clients on their efforts. It is a very 'pretty' package which helps when we are presenting it to clients on how we can use this too to meet their requirements.
cons: The reporting is a little light at the moment, and we have implemented some PowerBI solutions to address that, however they are actively working on enhancing that component and it is looking pretty good so far. The API also needs some attention, again they are working on that actively and soliciting requirements as to what we want it to be able to do which is outstanding.

review_title: issues with accuracy of employee routes and reporting
description: Not great as of yet. Will wait to see what explaination customer service can come up with for this
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: That there is such a thing which would make sense.
cons: My husband has just begun work with a company using this software. Every shift he does exactly what the job requires yet he has had feedback that the app has not picked up when he has made required check and at times registered hundreds of times at the same location when he is not at that location. Clearly the app is not functioning correctly because how can it ping someone at the same location 103 times and 400 times in another and then not pick up when he has done his scheduled sweeps. The security cameras and night manger where he is working can both verify he is doing his job correctly yet two weeks in the company are relying on this app and it's data to suggest he isn't doing his job correctly. Has this happened before? If so can the app developer please let us know what could be at fault and how to fix it?
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Positive, I'm an early adapter, been using for 5+ years
author: Joshua W.
pros: The Google Platform and live monitoring capability - looks great in our control room.
cons: Monthly reporting doesn't look 'sexy'. Needs more work. Also need to recommend more reporting features - you are an analyst company, inside a tech company. I don't know what reports I want, you need to tell me.

review_title: Excellent service with an outstanding product.
author: William S.
pros: The fact that the Lighthouse team are always developing and moving forward is what really adds to this product . They're great to deal with and have always responded promptly to action. The app is growing and ever developing to tailor to its clients needs. This is really turning out to be an A+ product and look forward to its growing use.
cons: Not much to dislike honestly.. From time to time it may take a moment to login, or the syncing might take a while longer than normal - something we encounter with most software anyway.

description: Not good, and generally over rated
author: Ismael C.
pros: It works sometimes, when it doesn't it just fails...
cons: The servers used by Lighthouse (When we used lighthouse) bogged down exponentially, directly after the switch from Lighthouse to team software. We where happy to do business with a small business like ourselves. As soon as the switch happened so did the switch in customer service.

review_title: A powerful platform that helps me better manage cleaning services on a daily basis.
description: Lighthouse.io provides a powerful platform that helps me better manage cleaning services on a daily basis. I can identify issues in real-time and the reports give me a really good understanding of how we're tracking against KPI's
author: Hussein Z.
pros: Time is the most critical asset. Lighthouse.io gives me the ability to track, optimize & analyse how time is spent by our workforce.It simplifies our timesheets, tasks & reports. Front line staff find it very easy to enter their time, report issues, report rotations & completing tasks. Lighthouse team provides an excellent customer support & always listening to their customers.
cons: As a workforce management platform I found Lighthouse.io very adaptable to business needs, finding management solutions across a variety of different sites & different services. I would like to see an expansion to cover more HR management & recruitment process.

description: I would highly recommend Lighthouse.io. The team is always available and happy to assist. The software system is the most advanced system that I have seen, the technology is amazing. They are always working towards bringing improvements into the system. Lighthouse have really simplified the system for the end user, they understand that not everyone is technologically savvy. This system has had a positive impact on our business and our clients.
author: Kylie M.
pros: The Lighthouse.io system is so easy to install and use. Even staff members that aren't use to using a 'smart' phone technology are finding the system easy to use. We also love the 'live mapping' and 'heat map system'. It provides you with a quick summary , you can quickly identify areas that need attention immediately.
cons: The area that we wanted improvements in was automatic reporting - which Lighthouse.io has just brought in. We are now receiving daily reports across our sites

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Great functionality and easily customised to suit individual site requirements
cons: Some areas under active development, so very excited to see this platform expand

review_title: Lighthouse makes flowcharts easier to look at
author: Derek R.
pros: It makes is so much easier to use for work without having my managers to print out a daily flow chart for room set ups. I can even look up what's in store for work a week ahead of actually being onsite by using the app on my phone. PSAV was smart in buying this software for all regions national and international to help make work easier for those who don't have admin rights to print paperwork.
cons: Nothing, it's very helpful, easy and less papers to carry around and end up losing somewhere.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Overall adds significant value to the business, and drives cost reductions in public liability.
author: Darren L.
pros: Enables us to manage our public liability exposure by recording instantly and they happen. Also provided us with the ability to track and manage our staff while on shift
cons: The back end system is sometimes difficult to get the type of reports we wanted. However Ben and his team have allways developed and implemented what ever reporting we required

review_title: Lighthouse application at a Five Star International Hotel
description: The customer service has been exceptional, as has the follow up, both by email and phone. Lighthouse has been committed to all stakeholders from installation through to ongoing support.
author: Peter A.
pros: Simple UI interface - the colour scheme and display menu and options/tools Easy navigation Customised templates Real time reporting and the running of the reports The live tracking of points Heat map functionality
cons: Battery drainage due to constant GPS usage, whilst logged into the application. This has been managed on site Some functionality, heat map in particular, unavailable during system/version upgrades

description: Currently, we are solving accountability issues. The real-time device markers (both GPS and QR code scans) have assisted greatly with all clients currently using Lighthouse.
author: Angelic S.
pros: User-Friendly App Available Open API Various Tracking options Interactive Map Customizable Reports
cons: Unable to create geofences and locations (have to request it) Unable to create working QR Codes/Zones Unable to do a real-time rewind (select a time and watch movement up to the present or selected end time) Unable to load in PDF files (such as Post Orders) for employees to easily access

description: We have had a great experience with support team. Their product has been extremely beneficial in assisting us in collecting data from our security patrols, reporting and with our Key Performance Indicator Reports to our clients.
author: Don H.
pros: The customer service is fantastic, they have responded quickly to all our questions and needs. They are always asking us for input and improving the product.
cons: The original product had some issues however, they worked hard and fast to overcome those deficiencies and now have a great product.

review_title: Very good thus far, easy to use product with a wide variety of features.
author: Ryan O.
pros: Incorporating Lighthouse.io has been a positive step forward for our business. It allows us to provide verifiable proof to clients that our staff are attending client sites and carrying out all required tasks. As field staff use Lighthouse.io through a mobile device, the ability for them to simply and efficiently check what tasks they need to complete at each site has been a massive improvement to how we operated previously.
cons: There are some administrative tasks that require a member of the lighthouse.io team to carry out behind the scenes, which they do in a prompt fashion. It would be beneficial to us to have the ability to do this ourselves, this is something we have identified as a feature we would like to see added.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: valaria R.
pros: efficient when checking on workers and their location. and how long they have been at certain locations
cons: after loading a task sometimes it takes too long for submission of task to load and go to next issue. Workers sometimes have to off phone and reload then it works. This process takes too long

author: Kristin L.
pros: Seemed very accurate / lots of reporting to run
cons: A lot of the recall lists and reporting seemed manual..

author: Otis V.
pros: I love the GPS feature fairly accurate and the reports that you are able to run
cons: The setting up of the beacons could be easier

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: As a Venue manager I can track my staff, create task, reach our KPI with QR codes scanning. Easily create reports for reports.
cons: To add after photos when closing a task issue but it has been raised with developers. Should been ready in few Months
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall the relationship has been positive, professional, and as promised.
author: Andrew M.
pros: We love the ease of use and scalability of the program. Our staff and customers can't say enough great things about Lighthouse.io!
cons: We would very much like to see the addition of a Visitor Management Module.

author: Morteza V.
pros: pretty straight forward and easy to use application, also received propriate support where needed. keeps continuous record of our attendance whilst on duty
cons: Multiple inactive users throughout the day which might be due to having bad reception on site

review_title: Very helpful product and great customer service
description: Most impressed with their service, appreciate their efforts to fix any issues and answer any questions
author: Magdalea O.
pros: Great customer service, quick response and follow ups to make sure that we are happy with the outcome
cons: I'd prefer you could move things up and down in the template as currently it's a matter of copy & paste.

description: We have found the Lighthouse.io product has added significant value in respect to Task Management & Client Reporting.
author: Ian D.
pros: Client Reporting and Data Management functionality Easy to use
cons: Scanning QR codes sometimes difficult, possibly the quality of our hardware contributes to this issue.

description: -Gather good analytical data and increase workforce productivity
author: Vipul P.
pros: Easy to navigate and simple Live Reporting Good Beacon system Good Customer service and Support
cons: - It is best work force management system in cleaning service industry so far. - It can be more automated by scheduling task

description: We had problems with tracking security guard movements across our sites. Lighthouse enabled us to view movement throughout their patrols. Lighthouse also produces a formatted report which is detailed and well presented.
author: E.J E.
pros: That it was accessible by mobile phone, P.C and tablet. The Lighthouse CSM conducted one on one training with me over the phone. This made it easier to ask questions as it was more direct an oppose to online training.
cons: I liked everything about this software hands down was everything I was looking for.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
